# Udyog — GST Billing Software for Indian Businesses
# https://udyogbook.in

Udyog is an AI-powered GST billing software built specifically for Indian small businesses, retailers, traders, and MSMEs.

## What Udyog Does
- Create GST-compliant invoices in seconds using voice commands (Maya AI)
- Manage inventory, parties, and payments
- Generate GSTR-1, GSTR-2B, GSTR-3B reports
- Collaborate with Chartered Accountants via CA portal
- Rental equipment management and billing
- Works for both GST-registered and non-GST businesses

## Key Features
- Maya: India's first Hindi/Hinglish voice billing AI agent
- Free GST invoice maker online
- Easy GST bill software for mobile
- Voice GST software in Hindi
- CA collaboration portal
- WhatsApp invoice sharing
- Purchase bill management
- Party ledger and outstanding tracking

## Target Users
- Small shop owners (kirana, retail, wholesale)
- Service providers (CA, lawyers, consultants)
- Rental businesses (equipment, furniture)
- Traders and manufacturers
- MSMEs and startups

## Pricing
- Trial: 14 days free
- Basic: ₹149/month
- Enterprise: ₹499/month

## URLs
- Website: https://udyogbook.in
- App: https://app.udyogbook.in
- Blog: https://udyogbook.in/blog
- Pricing: https://udyogbook.in/pricing

GST invoice maker, billing software for small business, Vyapar alternative,
myBillBook alternative, GST software Hindi, kirana store billing, 
MSME billing software, CA portal software, rental billing software India,
